_comment_variable_conventions: These are INTERNAL variables used for callback-to-callback communication.
The underscore prefix signals 'do not set in session_parameters' -- they
are written by the LLM (via set_session_state) or by callbacks, never by
the caller. In evals, you should NEVER set these in session_parameters.
These are either INPUT variables (account_id, customer_id -- set by the
telephony platform) or DERIVED variables (auth_status, user_role -- set
by the before_agent_callback from API lookups).
auth_status defaults to '' so the before_agent_callback can use a simple
truthy check: if state.get('auth_status') --> falsy on first run, truthy
after being set. If the default were 'UNKNOWN', the callback would need
explicit value comparison, which is error-prone and verbose.
GECX session state only supports string values. The before_model_callback
name: sample_support_agent
description: Sample customer support agent demonstrating GECX best practices
_comment_model_settings: The '-live' suffix enables bidirectional streaming for voice.
_comment_audio_settings: Set these for voice agents. Text-only agents can omit them.
toolExecutionMode: PARALLEL reduces latency by running independent
tool calls concurrently instead of sequentially.
_comment_logging_settings: For VOICE/AUDIO agents ONLY: evaluationAudioRecordingConfig MUST be provided
to run audio evaluations. Without it, the platform will return a 400 BadRequestException.
For TEXT/CHAT agents: You can remove this entire evaluationAudioRecordingConfig block.
_comment_eval_thresholds: These control how goldens are scored. Adjust via app-thresholds.py.
extraToolCallBehavior: ALLOW lets the agent call extra tools without failing.
hallucinationMetricBehavior: DISABLED avoids false failures from the scorer.

variableDeclarations.name: account_id
variableDeclarations.description: Customer account identifier from telephony platform

variableDeclarations.name: user_role
variableDeclarations.description: Derived user role from customer profile lookup

variableDeclarations.name: customer_name
variableDeclarations.description: Derived customer name from profile lookup

variableDeclarations.name: _action_trigger
variableDeclarations.description: Internal trigger for deterministic callback actions

variableDeclarations.name: _escalation_topic
variableDeclarations.description: Internal topic category for escalation routing

variableDeclarations.name: api_failed
variableDeclarations.description: Flag indicating API failure in callbacks
